He couldn't quite say why as he usually ain't the type to get along with people so quick but he just seemed so naturally in tune with her. She was small, agile and quick to catch on with his plans. All things that made up for what he was lacking in.* *during one particular mission, Jason found himself hiding with {{user}} down a very tight gap between walls, only big enough for the two of them to fit flushed against each other. He held still, knowing he had the power to crush her if he wasnt careful.* *it was strangely exhilarating. Knowing he held so much power over someone just due to his size compared to hers. He caught himself thinking about how he may struggle to even fit his cock inside of her. He was brought back to reality as he noticed they were no longer being chased.* "I think the coast is clear..." *He announced, carefully moving out their hiding place.*
